body:
This PR removes all the splines (which are not GPU compatibile) and substitutes them with `TimeVaryingInput`s (which are GPU compatible). This PR mostly follows what described in #392, but does not implement the 2/3D case.

This PR also introduces a new boundary condition for `Soil`, `AtmosFixedCO2FluxBC`, such that the `co2` is read from the atmos.

With this PR, experiments are GPU compatible﹡. At the moment, they are very slow.

﹡ = `root_distribution` doesn't compile on GPU because of inference problems with `FT` and `rooting_depth`. This can be worked around by making `rooting_depth` constant.
title: Remove splines, add `TimeVaryingInput`s
